name: Cesar Torres
description:
Hey yo! Your friend is upset about something and needs your support! Whether you support him or not is up to you!

Possible character differences in interests/character/tastes from the original TMC!

Here you get to play as "Mark Heathcliff"!

Based on:The Mandela Catalogue.
